opensearchservice.domain.zoneawarenessco: Specifies zone awareness configuration options. Only use if `ZoneAwarenessEnabled` is `true`.

opensearchservice.domain.zoneawarenessco.Description: If you enabled multiple Availability Zones (AZs), the number of AZs that you want the domain to use.  Valid values are `2` and `3`. Default is 2.
